## Description

Official final national election results for the 24th Knesset, published by the
Central Elections Committee (ועדת הבחירות המרכזית).

**Election date:** 2021-03-23 (Tuesday, 23 March 2021)

**Faction IDs** in `party_list_mapping.yaml` for Knesset 24 are keyed from
recorded `KNS_Faction` OData:

`https://knesset.gov.il/Odata/ParliamentInfo.svc/KNS_Faction?$format=json&$filter=KnessetNum eq 24&$top=200`

(captured 2026-05-03 UTC, SHA-256 `de042294791435914281d82752599aee308508a1af091ab98c3fa0a607ea19ae`).
